publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-11-15 23:07:52 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection contains grant files, publications, subject files, photographs.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Robin Bellinder papers, #21-41-4284. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Professor of Horticulture and expert in weed control in vegetable crops.

did.unittitle: P. minor weed seed sample data
Data for "Improving herbicide application accuracy in South Asia"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Maps, negatives, photos, overheads and a powerpoint presentation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes - A Review of the Science…in Tap Water Blues: Herbicides in Drinking Water

did.unittitle: Assessment of agricultural research in Afghanistan
New Tools for Mechanical Weed Control in Vegetables
Cultivation and Interseeding Weed Suppression or Competition?
Dry Bean Weed Management Weed Research
Interseeded Cover Crops Weed Suppression or Competition?
To Till or Not to Till?
Sustainability is not a Cost of "One Size Fits All"
To Till or Not to Till
Weed Science: The Art of Controlling Weeds
NYS Strawberry Growers Weed Management Strategies and Pesticide Use Survey
Efficient Weed Management in Paddy (transplanted rice)
Herbicide Residue Studies Carried Out at CCS HAU HISAR
New Tools for Mechanical Weed Control in Vegetables

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photograph scrapbook documenting the field experience students from the International Agriculture and Rural Development course had in India.

did.unittitle: Identifying New Herbicides for Cabbage Third Quarter Progress Report
Dry Bean Weed Management Research Report

Report on Weed Management Research in Peas

Photographs of labeled plants from India
